queries.question:
This 'cancel' instruction performs 1 token transfer(s). Analyze the transfers and provide:
1. Explicit parameter names for all Pubkey authorities involved (from/to for each transfer)
2. Explicit parameter names for transfer amounts
3. Any distinctness constraints between authorities (e.g., from ≠ to)
4. The complete theorem signature with ALL parameters explicitly declared

Transfer details:
  Transfer 1: from=Some("escrow_token_account"), to=Some("initializer_deposit_token_account"), authority=Some("escrow"), amount=None

Example response format:
{
  "query_id": "cancel_conservation",
  "parameters": [
    {"name": "p_from_authority", "param_type": "Pubkey", "description": "Authority of the from account"},
    {"name": "p_to_authority", "param_type": "Pubkey", "description": "Authority of the to account"},
    {"name": "p_amount", "param_type": "Nat", "description": "Transfer amount"}
  ],
  "distinctness_constraints": ["p_from_authority ≠ p_to_authority"],
  "theorem_signature": "theorem cancel_conservation (p_accounts p_accounts' : List Account) (p_from_authority p_to_authority : Pubkey) (p_amount : Nat) (h_distinct : p_from_authority ≠ p_to_authority) (h : cancelPreservesBalances p_accounts p_from_authority p_to_authority p_amount = some p_accounts') : trackedTotal p_accounts = trackedTotal p_accounts'"
}
